assertions.request_provider: run-scoped runtime log binds one requestId to chat_request provider=codex

crash_recovery_run.command: NAIA_CODEX_E2E_SIMULATE_WORKER_CRASH=1 NAIA_AGENT_SCRIPT=/var/home/luke/alpha-adk/projects/naia-agent-worktrees/integration-discord-codex/scripts/builds/agent-stdio-entry.mjs NAIA_AGENT_PROTO_DIR=/var/home/luke/alpha-adk/projects/naia-agent-worktrees/integration-discord-codex/src/main/adapters/grpc pnpm exec wdio run e2e-tauri/wdio.conf.codex.ts

regression.shell_ui: 121 files passed, 2 skipped; 1332 tests passed, 13 skipped

diagnostic_note: Early diagnostic runs exposed harness defects rather than product failures: an unsupported two-argument expect call, provider/usage assertions that were not causally scoped to one request, and an undisposed permission poller that hot-looped after WebKit session teardown and exhausted the worker heap. The final committed source binds provider/usage/finish to one requestId, scopes cost to the marker DOM element, adds durable crash recovery and isolated WebView state, and exits 0. The separate crash run intentionally exits nonzero and proves byte-identical config restoration.
